name: BBQ Ribs 1991 World BBQ Contest Winner "Memphis in May
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix salt, black pepper, chili powder, ketchup, white vinegar, water, and sorghum molasses in a jar. Cover and shake well.
2. Sprinkle the rub generously on ribs. Allow to stand at room temperature for 20 to 30 minutes until the rub appears wet.
3. Prepare smoker using hickory chips for flavor. Cook ribs, bone side down, at 230°F for 2 hours using indirect heat. Turn and cook for another hour.
4. During the last 15 minutes of cooking, baste ribs with BBQ sauce diluted by half with water.
5. Serve ribs with warm, undiluted sauce on the side.
Drain excess liquid from the sauce before serving.
